name: Atkins Porter Recreational Center
description: Atkins Porter Recreational Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Paris, TN. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Cutright Pickleplex
description: Cutright Pickleplex is a place to play pickleball in Paris, TN. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Eiffel Tower Park
description: Eiffel Tower Park is a place to play pickleball in Paris, TN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
